testcase.name: Critical Fixes: WebSocket & Conversation Context › Fix #1: Real-Time Comment Display Without Refresh

failure.message: websocket-and-conversation-validation.spec.ts:37:3 Fix #1: Real-Time Comment Display Without Refresh

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › websocket-and-conversation-validation.spec.ts:37:3 › Critical Fixes: WebSocket & Conversation Context › Fix #1: Real-Time Comment Display Without Refresh
TimeoutError: page.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Create Post"), a[href*="/create"]')
40 | // Step 1: Create a test post 41 | console.log('Step 1: Creating test post...'); > 42 | await page.click('button:has-text("Create Post"), a[href*="/create"]', { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 43 | await page.waitForURL(/.*\/create/, { timeout: 10000 }); 44 | 45 | await page.fill('input[name="title"], textarea[placeholder*="title" i]', 'WebSocket Test Post'); at /workspaces/agent-feed/tests/e2e/websocket-and-conversation-validation.spec.ts:42:16
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/websocket-and-conversation-069e5-ent-Display-Without-Refresh-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/websocket-and-conversation-069e5-ent-Display-Without-Refresh-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../../test-results/websocket-and-conversation-069e5-ent-Display-Without-Refresh-chromium/error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
🧪 TEST: Real-time comment display (no refresh needed) Step 1: Creating test post...
